stemHtml: If an IFR flight operated in IMC in a controlled airspace, where radar is not used in the provision of air traffic control, encounters a communication failure, it shall maintain the last assigned...

options.a: speed and level for a period of 10 minutes and thereafter descend in VMC and continue the flight to the nearest suitable aerodrome.
options.b: speed and level for a period of 20 minutes and thereafter adjust level and speed in accordance with the filed flight plan.
options.c: level for a period of 5 minutes and thereafter continue in accordance with the filed flight plan.
options.d: speed and level for a period of 10 minutes and thereafter descend and land at the nearest suitable aerodrome.
